answer_raw: First, find the wave speed. The wavelength λ = g * T^2 / (2 * π) = 9.81 m/s^2 * (8 s)^2 / (2 * π) ≈ 99.65 m. The wave speed = ω * λ / (2 * π) = (2 * π / 8 s) * 99.65 m / (2 * π) = 12.45 m/s. The relative velocity = ship speed - wave speed = 15 m/s - 12.45 m/s = 2.55 m/s.
